scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck
scripts.db:seed: npm run db:seed:sql && npm --prefix backend exec tsx backend/scripts/seed-supabase.ts
